name: downloadyes
description: A sleek black & white YouTube downloader — pure JS, works anywhere

scripts.build: mkdir -p node_modules/youtube-dl-exec/bin && curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp_linux -o node_modules/youtube-dl-exec/bin/yt-dlp && chmod +x node_modules/youtube-dl-exec/bin/yt-dlp
